task_description: Perform end-to-end validation of the complete Sleep Audio Pipeline, polish all documentation, and bring the project to a clean completion state. This is the final development issue - the pipeline should be functionally complete, well-documented, and ready for deployment.

verification.summary: All 104 tests pass (96 existing + 8 new comprehensive E2E tests). cdk synth succeeds for both dev and prod environments. New ComprehensiveEndToEndTest.java validates real synthesized template content via JSON parsing, not just string matching. Documentation polished and SUMMARY.md created.
